title: Action
description: Binding governance action. Authority: BINDING. Requires Decision reference. Enforces Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass): no Action without Decision. EB-1 enforces that a Hypothesis artifact_id cannot serve as decision_ref.
$comment: Extracted from alagf-demo/artifacts/__init__.py@Action (Sprint-0 formalization). Runtime enforcement includes EB-1 HYP_ prefix rejection and mandatory policy_reference.

decision_ref.description: Reference to the authorizing Decision artifact. Must match DEC_ prefix. HYP_ prefix is rejected (EB-1). Enforces Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass).

observation_refs.description: Optional references to the observational evidence trail.

policy_reference.description: Policy identifier authorizing this action. Required. Enforces Invariant 3 (Evidence-First).
